title: iliamna rivularis subsp. diversa
intro: Iliamna rivularis subsp. diversa, also known as the alpine globemallow, is a plant species in the family Malvaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The alpine globemallow is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human use.
